---
title: "About"
subtitle: "Authors, Book Information, and Contact"
toc: false
---

## The Book

*Portfolio Construction and Risk Analysis* (PCRA) is a graduate-level textbook providing a rigorous, unified treatment of quantitative investment management. Planned for publication in 2026 by Springer.

---

## Authors

### R. Douglas Martin

Professor Emeritus of Applied Mathematics and Statistics at the University of Washington. Pioneer in robust statistics with applications to finance; co-creator of the S-PLUS and R `robust` and related packages. Author of numerous papers on robust portfolio construction and risk management.

### Thomas K. Philips

Quantitative investment practitioner and researcher with decades of experience in asset management. His work spans equity portfolio construction, factor investing, and the application of statistical methods to financial markets.

### Bernd Scherer

Professor and quantitative investment researcher. Author of *Portfolio Construction and Risk Budgeting* (Risk Books) and other leading texts in quantitative finance. Research focuses on portfolio optimization, risk management, and factor investing.

### Kirk Li

Quantitative researcher and practitioner specializing in systematic investment strategies, factor models, and the application of machine learning to portfolio management.

---

## PDF Downloads

| Appendix | Title | Download |
|---|---|---|
| A | Mathematical Tools for PCRA | [PDF](Appendix%20A%20Math%20for%20PCRA.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| B | Probability & Statistics for PCRA | [PDF](Appendix%20B%20ProbStat%20for%20PCRA.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| C | Utility Theory | [PDF](Appendix%20C%20Utility%20Theory.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| D | Portfolio Theory | [PDF](Appendix%20D%20Portfolio%20Theory.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| E | Machine Learning | [PDF](Appendix%20E%20Machine%20Learning.pdf){target="_blank"} |

---

## Citation

```bibtex
@book{MartinPhilipsSchererLi2026,
  author    = {Martin, R. Douglas and Philips, Thomas K. and
               Scherer, Bernd and Li, Kirk},
  title     = {Portfolio Construction and Risk Analysis},
  publisher = {Springer},
  year      = {2026},
  note      = {In press}
}
```

---

::: {.callout-important appearance="minimal"}
**Copyright.** All material on this site is planned for publication in 2026 by R. Douglas Martin, Thomas K. Philips, Bernd Scherer, and Kirk Li. All rights reserved. © Copyright 2025. No part of this material may be reproduced without prior written permission from the authors.
:::
